disclaimerText: The information provided above is for illustrative purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Investments involve risks, and past performance is not indicative of future results. The figures displayed are hypothetical and do not reflect actual investment returns. It is important to conduct thorough research and seek advice from a qualified financial advisor before making any investment decisions. We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of the information presented here. The user assumes all responsibility for their investment choices.

feedback.title: We love feedback
feedback.text: Have an idea how to improve Kalkul? Something didn’t work as expected? Something you really loved? Anything else?... we’re listening. Your feedback help us make Kalkul better, thank you!

linkSharingConfirmation.title: Turn link sharing off?
linkSharingConfirmation.text: The current link will no longer work, people might lose access.
linkSharingConfirmation.smallText: If you re-activate link sharing later on, a new link will be generated.
